import{useEffect,useState}from"react";import{SendMessageComposer}from"../../api";import{ReportPoliceCallComposer}from"@nitrots/nitro-renderer/src/nitro/communication/messages/outgoing/roleplay/ReportPoliceCallComposer";import{AcceptPoliceCallComposer}from"@nitrots/nitro-renderer/src/nitro/communication/messages/outgoing/roleplay/AcceptPoliceCallComposer";import"./PoliceCallView.scss";import{jsx as _jsx}from"react/jsx-runtime";import{jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";export const PoliceCallView=()=>{const[open,setOpen]=useState(false);const[data,setData]=useState(null);const[reportText,setReportText]=useState("");useEffect(()=>{const onOpen=e=>{const{detail}=e;if(!detail)return;setData(detail);setReportText("");setOpen(true);};window.addEventListener("open_police_call",onOpen);return()=>window.removeEventListener("open_police_call",onOpen);},[]);if(!open||!data)return null;const accept=()=>{try{SendMessageComposer(new AcceptPoliceCallComposer(data.username,data.virtualRoomId,data.virtualRoomName// <-- added third arg
));}catch{}setOpen(false);};const sendReport=()=>{try{const msg=reportText.trim();SendMessageComposer(new ReportPoliceCallComposer(data.username,data.virtualRoomId,msg));}catch{}setOpen(false);};return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"police-modal",role:"dialog","aria-modal":"true","aria-label":"Police Call",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"pm-head",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{children:"Police Dispatch"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{className:"pm-close",onClick:()=>setOpen(false),"aria-label":"Close"})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"pm-body",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("img",{className:"pm-headimg",src:`https://www.habbo.com/habbo-imaging/avatarimage?figure=${encodeURIComponent(data.figure)}&direction=2&headonly=1&size=m`,alt:`${data.username}'s avatar`}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"pm-lines",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("b",{children:"From:"})," ",data.username]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("b",{children:"Location:"})," #",data.virtualRoomId," \u2014"," ",data.virtualRoomName]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"pm-msg",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("b",{children:"Message:"})," ",data.message]})]})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"pm-report",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("label",{children:["Report (optional):",/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("textarea",{value:reportText,onChange:e=>setReportText(e.target.value),placeholder:"Notes / reason / resolved outcome\u2026"})]})}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"pm-actions",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{className:"habbo-action-button green",onClick:accept,children:"Accept"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{className:"habbo-action-button blue",onClick:sendReport,children:"Report"})]})]});};export default PoliceCallView;
